body:
Hi @dennisYatunin, can you please take this PR over and replace the characters that are being replaced with ones that are readable? These characters don't seem to render in my browser, vscode, or in the REPL-- so I have no idea if they are distinguishable or not.

If someone else knows what these characters are supposed to be, I would really appreciate the help here.
title: Make implicit test variables readable
